byOptionId.href: Correct â€” href on <a> specifies the link destination.
byOptionId.src: Incorrect â€” src is used for resources like images and scripts, not for anchor destinations.
byOptionId.link: Incorrect â€” 'link' is not an attribute for anchors.
byOptionId.url: Incorrect â€” 'url' is a generic term but not the anchor attribute name.

questions.prompt: Was Their The Their Their To

options.label: A link to another page on the same website
A link to a different domain
A link to a local file only
A link that only points to images

explanations.overview: Interne Links zielen auf Seiten innerhalb derselben Website ab.

byOptionId.same-site: Correct â€” internal links target pages on the same domain or site.
byOptionId.external: Incorrect â€” external links point to different domains.
byOptionId.file: Incorrect â€” linking to local files is possible but not the typical definition of internal links.
byOptionId.image: Incorrect â€” the target can be any resource, not specifically images.

byOptionId.newtab: Correct â€” target="_blank" opens the destination in a new tab or window.
byOptionId.internal: Incorrect â€” target does not change whether a link is internal or external.
byOptionId.nofollow: Incorrect â€” rel="nofollow" is used for search engine hints, not target behavior.
byOptionId.download: Incorrect â€” the download attribute suggests downloading; target=_blank opens in a new tab.
